description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a white perimeter wall and lush landscaping, including several mature trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade with large glass windows and sliding doors, especially prominent on the rear side. The front of the property includes a driveway leading to a double garage gate and a pedestrian entrance, both integrated into the wall. The backyard is spacious, with a patio area furnished for outdoor living and additional green space. The building's exterior is predominantly white, with accents of gray and natural wood visible in the patio and some window frames. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, privacy, and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white walls, large glass windows, and lush landscaping, featuring a driveway, garage, and spacious backyard patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage gate, pedestrian gate, and dense greenery along the perimeter wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and a glimpse of the backyard patio and outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass windows, sliding doors, and the expansive backyard with patio and green space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing more of the backyard, additional trees, and the side entrance to the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rear-facing glass windows and grouped side windows
